title: Labs
description: Field notes, system diagrams, and research records from work at the intersection of ML and embedded systems.

items.title: Grid-first layout architecture
items.summary: 12-column desktop system with 8px base unit. Panels, regions, and fields as first-class objects.

items.title: Oxide-informed color theory
items.summary: How engineering restraint shapes a color system: monochrome first, accent as signal only.

items.title: TinyML pipeline - edge inference
items.summary: On-device inference architecture for microcontrollers. Quantization, power budgets, OTA updates.

items.title: Utility infrastructure and digital transformation
items.summary: Field notes from leading hardware engineering teams building electricity retail systems in Nigeria.

items.title: Type role taxonomy
items.summary: Three-role typography: sans for structure, serif for authority, mono for technical texture.

items.title: Embedded video analytics - lessons learned
items.summary: What breaks in production that never breaks in the lab. Notes from robotics and video analytics deployments.
